project_area: Tax relief and rebates for eligible Pennsylvanians
demographic_requirements: Older Pennsylvanians, people with disabilities, and low-to-moderate income individuals (expanded eligibility under increased income limits)
eligibility_summary: Eligibility varies by program but generally includes Pennsylvania residents who are older adults, individuals with disabilities, or low-to-moderate income taxpayers. Specific programs like the Property Tax/Rent Rebate Program target seniors and disabled individuals, while others like the Working Pennsylvanians Tax Credit benefit working taxpayers. Income limits and other criteria apply.
